docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PABLICO, GLENDA $611.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $681.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED JUN-25-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PABLICO, GLENDA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT PABLICO, GLENDA
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $707.12 - OCT-02-2014 FILED AS TO DEFENDANT PABLICO, GLENDA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $611.01 FILED BY PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT PABLICO, GLENDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARCOS PENA--EMPLOYEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PABLICO, GLENDA
